message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  MessageAlign left
  ArrowColor black
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontColor black
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantFontColor black
  GroupBorderColor black
  GroupHeaderFontColor black
  GroupFontColor black
}

actor User
participant GroupTable

User -> GroupTable : get group

alt [HttpStatusCode.OK]
  GroupTable --> User : return group JSON
else [HttpStatusCode.BadRequest]
  GroupTable --> User : return  NOT OK message
end
@enduml
